title: batch: JmapRequestBuilder accepts empty using array without warning
description: JmapRequestBuilder::new() accepts an empty using Vec, which produces a JmapRequest that the server will reject (urn:ietf:params:jmap:core is always required). The docstring should note this invariant and what happens if violated. No code change needed — just docstring clarification.
close_reason: Fixed: to_value() uses json! macro, call_batch() detects duplicate call_ids, new() docstring updated
